description: Material cybersecurity incidents disclosed in SEC 8-K Item 1.05 and related legacy 8-K cybersecurity disclosures.

claim_fields.name: item_105_flag
claim_fields.description: Whether the filing explicitly identifies Item 1.05 or a material cybersecurity incident disclosure.

claim_fields.name: amendment_flag
claim_fields.description: Whether the filing is an amendment or update to an earlier cybersecurity disclosure.

claim_fields.name: cybersecurity_incident_event_type
claim_fields.description: Conservative incident category supported by filing text.

claim_fields.name: ransomware_mentioned
claim_fields.description: Whether ransomware, extortion, encryption, or similar language is explicitly mentioned.

claim_fields.name: customer_data_exposure_mentioned
claim_fields.description: Whether customer, client, consumer, or personal data exposure is explicitly mentioned.

claim_fields.name: operational_disruption_mentioned
claim_fields.description: Whether operations, systems, business interruption, or service disruption is explicitly mentioned.

claim_fields.name: third_party_vendor_mentioned
claim_fields.description: Whether a third party, vendor, supplier, or service provider is explicitly implicated.

claim_fields.name: financial_impact_language
claim_fields.description: Quoted language about financial impact, cost, revenue, operations, or results.

claim_fields.name: materiality_language
claim_fields.description: Quoted language about materiality or material impact.

claim_fields.name: impact_unknown_or_not_determined
claim_fields.description: Whether the filing says impact has not been determined, is unknown, or is still under assessment.

claim_fields.name: no_material_impact_language
claim_fields.description: Whether the filing says the incident did not have, or is not expected to have, a material impact.

claim_fields.name: reasonably_likely_material_impact_language
claim_fields.description: Whether the filing uses reasonably-likely material impact language.

claim_fields.name: incident_discovery_date
claim_fields.description: Date on which the registrant discovered or became aware of the incident, if stated.

claim_fields.name: materiality_determination_date
claim_fields.description: Date on which the registrant determined the incident was material, if stated.
